TH_PATCHOULI-FIRE_ELEMENT.title: Fire Element
TH_PATCHOULI-FIRE_ELEMENT.description:
At the start of your turn, decrease by [blue]1[/blue].
Whenever you apply [gold]Ignite[/gold], apply additional [gold]Ignite[/gold] equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-FIRE_ELEMENT.smartDescripti:
You have [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [red]Fire Element[/red].
At the start of your turn, decrease by [blue]1[/blue].
Whenever you apply [gold]Ignite[/gold], apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional [gold]Ignite[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-WATER_ELEMENT.title: Water Element
TH_PATCHOULI-WATER_ELEMENT.description: At the start of your turn, decrease by [blue]1[/blue] and apply [gold]Freeze[/gold] equal to your stacks to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-WATER_ELEMENT.smartDescript:
You have [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [blue]Water Element[/blue].
At the start of your turn, decrease by [blue]1[/blue] and apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Freeze[/gold] to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-WOOD_ELEMENT.title: Wood Element
TH_PATCHOULI-WOOD_ELEMENT.description:
At the start of your turn, decrease by [blue]1[/blue].
At the end of your turn, heal HP equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-WOOD_ELEMENT.smartDescripti:
You have [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [green]Wood Element[/green].
At the start of your turn, decrease by [blue]1[/blue].
At the end of your turn, heal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
TH_PATCHOULI-DIRT_ELEMENT.title: Earth Element
TH_PATCHOULI-DIRT_ELEMENT.description:
At the start of your turn, decrease by [blue]1[/blue].
At the end of your turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-DIRT_ELEMENT.smartDescripti:
You have [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [brown]Earth Element[/brown].
At the start of your turn, decrease by [blue]1[/blue].
At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-GOLD_ELEMENT.title: Gold Element
TH_PATCHOULI-GOLD_ELEMENT.description: At the start of your turn, decrease by [blue]1[/blue] and gain temporary [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-GOLD_ELEMENT.smartDescripti:
You have [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Gold Element[/gold].
At the start of your turn, decrease by [blue]1[/blue] and gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] temporary [gold]Strength[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_ELEMENT.title: Sun Element
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_ELEMENT.description: At the start of your turn, decrease by [blue]1[/blue] and gain Energy equal to half your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_ELEMENT.smartDescriptio:
You have [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [orange]Sun Element[/orange].
At the start of your turn, decrease by [blue]1[/blue] and gain [blue]{Amount}/2[/blue] Energy.
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_ELEMENT.title: Lunar Element
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_ELEMENT.description: At the start of your turn, decrease by [blue]1[/blue] and draw half your stacks cards.
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_ELEMENT.smartDescript:
You have [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [purple]Lunar Element[/purple].
At the start of your turn, decrease by [blue]1[/blue] and draw [blue]{Amount}/2[/blue] card(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-IGNITE_MARK.title: Ignite Mark
TH_PATCHOULI-IGNITE_MARK.description: Whenever you are applied [gold]Ignite[/gold], gain additional [gold]Ignite[/gold] equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-IGNITE_MARK.smartDescriptio: Whenever you are applied [gold]Ignite[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional [gold]Ignite[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-STICKY_BUBBLE.title: Sticky Bubble
TH_PATCHOULI-STICKY_BUBBLE.description: Whenever you attack or at the end of your turn, take [blue]10[/blue] damage and decrease by [blue]1[/blue].
TH_PATCHOULI-STICKY_BUBBLE.smartDescript: Whenever you attack or at the end of your turn, take [blue]10[/blue] damage and decrease by [blue]1[/blue].
TH_PATCHOULI-BUBBLE_SHIELD.title: Bubble Shield
TH_PATCHOULI-BUBBLE_SHIELD.description:
Whenever you take damage, reduce this by an equal amount and prevent that damage.
When removed, deal damage equal to its original stack count to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-BUBBLE_SHIELD.smartDescript:
Whenever you take damage, reduce this by an equal amount and prevent that damage.
When removed, deal {Cards:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-STATIC_GREEN_POWER.title: Static Green
TH_PATCHOULI-STATIC_GREEN_POWER.descript: At the end of your turn, if you played no more than [blue]5[/blue] cards this turn, gain Dexterity.
TH_PATCHOULI-STATIC_GREEN_POWER.smartDes: At the end of your turn, if you played no more than [blue]5[/blue] cards this turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-PAGE_STORM_POWER.title: Page Storm
TH_PATCHOULI-PAGE_STORM_POWER.descriptio: Whenever a card changes its pile, deal damage equal to your stacks to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-PAGE_STORM_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever a card changes its pile, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-PRINCESS_UNDINE_POWER.title: Undine Princess
TH_PATCHOULI-PRINCESS_UNDINE_POWER.descr: At the start of your turn, add [gold]Water Spirit[/gold] cards to your hand equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-PRINCESS_UNDINE_POWER.smart: At the start of your turn, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [blue]Water Spirit[/blue] to your hand.
TH_PATCHOULI-DELUGE_FORTY_DAY_POWER.desc: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Freeze[/gold] equal to your stacks to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-DELUGE_FORTY_DAY_POWER.smar: At the start of your turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Freeze[/gold] to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-JELLYFISH_PRINCESS_POWER.de: Whenever an enemy takes damage from you, apply [green]Poison[/green] equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-JELLYFISH_PRINCESS_POWER.sm: Whenever an enemy takes damage from you, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [green]Poison[/green].
TH_PATCHOULI-LIBRARY_MANAGER_POWER.title: Librarian
TH_PATCHOULI-LIBRARY_MANAGER_POWER.descr: At the start and end of your turn, choose up to [gold]cards in hand[/gold] equal to your stacks to gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-LIBRARY_MANAGER_POWER.smart: At the start and end of your turn, choose up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]cards in hand[/gold] to gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-UNHURRIED_POWER.title: Unhurried
TH_PATCHOULI-UNHURRIED_POWER.description: Whenever your [gold]draw pile[/gold] becomes empty, draw cards and gain Energy equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-UNHURRIED_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever your [gold]draw pile[/gold] becomes empty, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] card(s) and gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.
TH_PATCHOULI-CLOUD_FORM_POWER.title: Cloud Form
TH_PATCHOULI-CLOUD_FORM_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you are attacked, if your [gold]draw pile[/gold] is not empty, discard the top card and prevent the damage.
TH_PATCHOULI-CLOUD_FORM_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever you are attacked, if your [gold]draw pile[/gold] is not empty, discard the top card and prevent the damage.
TH_PATCHOULI-KNOWLEDGE_WALL_POWER.title: Knowledge Wall
TH_PATCHOULI-KNOWLEDGE_WALL_POWER.descri: At the end of your turn, reduce damage taken by your stacks for each card in hand until your next turn starts.
TH_PATCHOULI-KNOWLEDGE_WALL_POWER.smartD: At the end of your turn, reduce damage taken by [blue]{Amount}[/blue] for each card in hand until your next turn starts.
TH_PATCHOULI-FIRE_RAIN_POWER.title: Phlogistic Rain
TH_PATCHOULI-FIRE_RAIN_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Ignite[/gold] equal to your stacks to ALL enemies, that many times.
TH_PATCHOULI-FIRE_RAIN_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of your turn, apply [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Ignite[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time(s) to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-DIAMOND_HARDNESS_POWER.desc: At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Plated Armor[/gold] equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-DIAMOND_HARDNESS_POWER.smar: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Plated Armor[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-STATIC_LIBRARY_POWER.title: Static Library
TH_PATCHOULI-STATIC_LIBRARY_POWER.descri: Whenever you [gold]Retain[/gold] a card, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-EMERALD_CITY_POWER.title: Emerald City
TH_PATCHOULI-EMERALD_CITY_POWER.descript: This turn, whenever you are attacked, deal equal damage to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-EMERALD_CITY_POWER.smartDes: For [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turn(s), whenever you are attacked, deal equal damage to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-FALL_SLASHER_POWER.title: Hanging Sword
TH_PATCHOULI-FALL_SLASHER_POWER.descript: This turn, whenever you play a card, deal damage equal to your stacks to a random enemy.
TH_PATCHOULI-FALL_SLASHER_POWER.smartDes: This turn, whenever you play a card, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
TH_PATCHOULI-TRANSFORM_POWER.title: Transform
TH_PATCHOULI-TRANSFORM_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all your [gold]Elements[/gold], then gain that many random [gold]Elements[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-TRANSFORM_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all your [gold]Elements[/gold], then gain that many random [gold]Elements[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-WEEKLY_GIRL_POWER.title: Weekly Girl
TH_PATCHOULI-WEEKLY_GIRL_POWER.descripti: At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Elements[/gold] equal to your stacks in sequence.
TH_PATCHOULI-WEEKLY_GIRL_POWER.smartDesc:
At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] of the next [gold]Element[/gold] in sequence.
Next: {NextElement}.
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_PERIOD_POWER.title: Elemental Periodicity
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_PERIOD_POWER.descri: Whenever your [gold]Element[/gold] count decreases, gain [gold]Elements[/gold] equal to your stacks in sequence.
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_PERIOD_POWER.smartD:
Whenever your [gold]Element[/gold] count decreases, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] of the next [gold]Element[/gold] in sequence.
([gold]Gold[/gold]->[green]Wood[/green]->[blue]Water[/blue]->[red]Fire[/red]->[brown]Earth[/brown]->[orange]Sun[/orange]->[purple]Lunar[/purple]->[gold]Gold[/gold])
TH_PATCHOULI-UNPREDICTABLE_POWER.title: Unpredictable
TH_PATCHOULI-UNPREDICTABLE_POWER.descrip: Whenever you [gold]Transform[/gold] a card, set its Energy cost to 0 before it is played for the first time this turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-UNPREDICTABLE_POWER.smartDe: Whenever you [gold]Transform[/gold] a card, set its Energy cost to 0 before it is played for the first time this turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-WEAK_WITCH_POWER.title: Weak Witch
TH_PATCHOULI-WEAK_WITCH_POWER.descriptio: At the start of your turn, gain Energy equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-WEAK_WITCH_POWER.smartDescr: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_MANAGER_POWER.title: Element Manipulation
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_MANAGER_POWER.descr: Whenever your [gold]Element[/gold] count changes, deal damage equal to your stacks to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_MANAGER_POWER.smart: Whenever your [gold]Element[/gold] count changes, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_PREDICT_POWER.title: Element Prediction
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_PREDICT_POWER.descr: At the start of your next turn, gain random [gold]Elements[/gold] and Energy equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_PREDICT_POWER.smart: At the start of your next turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random [gold]Elements[/gold] and gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.
TH_PATCHOULI-DOUBLE_MAGIC_POWER.title: Double Spellcasting
TH_PATCHOULI-DOUBLE_MAGIC_POWER.descript: This turn, when you play a card, play it extra times equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-DOUBLE_MAGIC_POWER.smartDes: This turn, when you play a card, play it [blue]{Amount}[/blue] extra time(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-SEVEN_WITCH_POWER.title: Witch of the Seven Stars
TH_PATCHOULI-SEVEN_WITCH_POWER.descripti: At the start of your turn, for each [gold]Element[/gold] you have, draw cards and gain Energy equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-SEVEN_WITCH_POWER.smartDesc: At the start of your turn, for each [gold]Element[/gold] you have, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s) and gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_MAGICIAN_POWER.desc: Cards with [gold]Elements[/gold] cost 1 less Energy for each corresponding [gold]Element[/gold] you have.
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_MAGICIAN_POWER.smar: Cards with [gold]Elements[/gold] cost 1 less Energy for each corresponding [gold]Element[/gold] you have.
TH_PATCHOULI-EVERYTHING_CIRCLE_POWER.des: Whenever you [gold]Transform[/gold] a card, draw cards equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-EVERYTHING_CIRCLE_POWER.sma: Whenever you [gold]Transform[/gold] a card, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-KILL_RAT_POWER.title: Exterminate Rats
TH_PATCHOULI-KILL_RAT_POWER.description: This turn, enemies take multiplied damage equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-KILL_RAT_POWER.smartDescrip: This turn, enemies take [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times more damage.
TH_PATCHOULI-FORBIDDEN_BOOK_POWER.title: Forbidden Book
TH_PATCHOULI-FORBIDDEN_BOOK_POWER.descri: At the start of your turn, add random cards with [gold]Elements[/gold] equal to your stacks to your hand; their Energy cost is 0 before first play this turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-FORBIDDEN_BOOK_POWER.smartD: At the start of your turn, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random cards with [gold]Elements[/gold] to your hand; their Energy cost is 0 before first play this turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-FORBIDDEN_BOOK_POWER_PLUS.d: At the start of your turn, add [gold]upgraded[/gold] random cards with [gold]Elements[/gold] equal to your stacks to your hand; their Energy cost is 0 before first play this turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-FORBIDDEN_BOOK_POWER_PLUS.s: At the start of your turn, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]upgraded[/gold] random cards with [gold]Elements[/gold] to your hand; their Energy cost is 0 before first play this turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-RED_HALL_BRAIN_POWER.title: Red Hall Brain
TH_PATCHOULI-RED_HALL_BRAIN_POWER.descri:
Increase your hand size by your stacks.
At the start of your turn, draw additional cards equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-RED_HALL_BRAIN_POWER.smartD:
Increase your hand size by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
At the start of your turn, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional card(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-WITCH_TEA_END_OF_COMBAT_POW: At end of combat, increase your potion slot limit by your stacks.
At end of combat, increase your potion slot limit by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
TH_PATCHOULI-EVADE_WORLD_GIRL_POWER.desc: Whenever a card changes its pile, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-EVADE_WORLD_GIRL_POWER.smar: Whenever a card changes its pile, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-UNKNOWN_MAGIC_ELEMENT_POWER: Whenever your [gold]Element[/gold] count decreases, gain Energy equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-ENDLESS_MAKE_POWER.title: Endless Forge
TH_PATCHOULI-ENDLESS_MAKE_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, add [gold]Base Body[/gold] cards equal to your stacks to your hand.
TH_PATCHOULI-ENDLESS_MAKE_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Base Body[/gold] to your hand.
TH_PATCHOULI-BLOOD_CIRCLE_MAKE_POWER.des: You may play cards even without enough Energy, but lose HP equal to the card's base Energy cost times your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-BLOOD_CIRCLE_MAKE_POWER.sma: You may play cards even without enough Energy, but lose HP equal to the card's base Energy cost times [blue]{Cards}[/blue].
TH_PATCHOULI-LAVA_CROMLECH_POWER.title: Lava Cromlech
TH_PATCHOULI-LAVA_CROMLECH_POWER.descrip: This turn, convert attack damage you block into [gold]Ignite[/gold] dealt to the attacker.
TH_PATCHOULI-LAVA_CROMLECH_POWER.smartDe: For [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turn(s), convert attack damage you block into [gold]Ignite[/gold] dealt to the attacker.
TH_PATCHOULI-CIRCULAR_LAVA_BELT_POWER.de: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold], apply equal [gold]Ignite[/gold] to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-CIRCULAR_LAVA_BELT_POWER.sm: Whenever you gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold], apply equal [gold]Ignite[/gold] to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-HEPHAESTUS_HAMMER_POWER.des: At end of combat, randomly [gold]Upgrade[/gold] cards in your [gold]deck[/gold] equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-HEPHAESTUS_HAMMER_POWER.sma: At end of combat, randomly [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s) in your [gold]deck[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-ROYAL_DIAMOND_RING_POWER.de: Whenever a card enters your [gold]hand[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
TH_PATCHOULI-ROYAL_DIAMOND_RING_POWER.sm: Whenever a card enters your [gold]hand[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
TH_PATCHOULI-MERCURY_POISON_POWER.title: Mercury Poison
TH_PATCHOULI-MERCURY_POISON_POWER.descri: Whenever you deal unblocked damage, apply equal [green]Poison[/green] to the enemy.
TH_PATCHOULI-MERCURY_POISON_POWER.smartD: Whenever you deal unblocked damage, apply equal [green]Poison[/green] to the enemy.
TH_PATCHOULI-EMERALD_MEGALOPOLIS_POWER.d: Whenever you lose [gold]Block[/gold], gain that much [gold]Block[/gold] at the start of your next turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-EMERALD_MEGALOPOLIS_POWER.s: Whenever you lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold], gain that much [gold]Block[/gold] at the start of your next turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-PHOTOSYNTHESIS_POWER.title: Photosynthesis
TH_PATCHOULI-PHOTOSYNTHESIS_POWER.descri:
At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Regeneration[/gold] equal to your maximum Energy.
Whenever you lose HP, remove all [gold]Regeneration[/gold] and this effect.
TH_PATCHOULI-PHOTOSYNTHESIS_POWER.smartD:
At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount:energyIcons()}[/blue] [gold]Regeneration[/gold].
Whenever you lose HP, remove all [gold]Regeneration[/gold] and this effect.
TH_PATCHOULI-SUNSHINE_REFLECTOR_POWER.de: Whenever you play a card, gain Energy equal to half its base Energy cost.
TH_PATCHOULI-SUNSHINE_REFLECTOR_POWER.sm: Whenever you play a card, gain Energy equal to half its base Energy cost.
TH_PATCHOULI-SATELLITE_HIMAWARI_POWER.de: At the start of your turn, gain Energy and draw cards equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-SATELLITE_HIMAWARI_POWER.sm: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-DAMOCLES_SWORD_POWER.title: Damocles Sword
TH_PATCHOULI-DAMOCLES_SWORD_POWER.descri: Whenever you play a card, deal damage equal to your stacks to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-DAMOCLES_SWORD_POWER.smartD: Whenever you play a card, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-EMERALD_MEGALITH_POWER.desc: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold], deal damage equal to your stacks to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-EMERALD_MEGALITH_POWER.smar: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold], deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_BOOK_POWER.title: Lunar Grimoire
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_BOOK_POWER.descriptio: At end of combat, you may choose up to [gold]cards[/gold] equal to your stacks from all piles in this combat to add to your [gold]deck[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_BOOK_POWER.smartDescr: At end of combat, you may choose up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards from all piles in this combat to add to your [gold]deck[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_BOOK_POWER.selectionS: Select cards to add to your [gold]deck[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_RISE_POWER.title: Dawn Rising
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_RISE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, trigger all enemies' [gold]Ignite[/gold] a number of times equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_RISE_POWER.smartDescrip: At the start of your turn, trigger all enemies' [gold]Ignite[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time(s).
TH_PATCHOULI-GOLD_SILVER_POWER.title: Golden Thread, Silver Branch
TH_PATCHOULI-GOLD_SILVER_POWER.descripti: Whenever you deal damage, gain [gold]Gold[/gold] equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-WATER_MOON_POWER.title: Mirror Flower, Water Moon
TH_PATCHOULI-WATER_MOON_POWER.descriptio: This turn, when you play a card, add copies with [gold]Ethereal[/gold] equal to your stacks to your hand.
TH_PATCHOULI-WATER_MOON_POWER.smartDescr: This turn, when you play a card, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] copies of it with [gold]Ethereal[/gold] to your hand.
TH_PATCHOULI-MOON_DIRT_POWER.title: Stagnant Moon
TH_PATCHOULI-MOON_DIRT_POWER.description: Whenever a card is [gold]Retain[/gold]ed, reduce its Energy cost by your stacks this combat.
TH_PATCHOULI-MOON_DIRT_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever a card is [gold]Retain[/gold]ed, reduce its Energy cost by [blue]{Amount}[/blue] this combat.
TH_PATCHOULI-PHILOSOPHER_STONE_POWER.des: This turn, when you play a card, trigger all its [gold]Element[/gold] effects extra times equal to your stacks.
TH_PATCHOULI-PHILOSOPHER_STONE_POWER.sma: This turn, when you play a card, trigger all its [gold]Element[/gold] effects [blue]{Amount}[/blue] extra time(s).
